overview: This onboarding journey introduces you to the NestJS Starter architecture by guiding you through the project configuration, the application entry point, and the fundamental controller-service pattern that powers our API structure.

days.title: Project Configuration and Tooling
days.objective: Understand the build pipeline, dependency management, and configuration settings required to run the development environment.

steps.reason: Review project scripts and dependencies to understand the ecosystem.
Examine the TypeScript compiler options for the project.
Identify how the NestJS CLI integrates with the build process.

days.title: Application Entry Point and Bootstrapping
days.objective: Understand how the application starts and how the root module acts as the dependency injection container.

steps.reason: Analyze the bootstrap process and middleware configuration at the entry point.
Examine the root module that defines the application architecture.

days.title: API Layer: Controllers and Services
days.objective: Master the request handling flow through controllers and the business logic abstraction in service providers.

steps.reason: Review route definitions and how requests are mapped to service calls.
Understand the implementation of business logic and internal data handling.
